## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Projectmark and GrowthX to discuss SEO strategy and content performance.](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Impressions are increasing, but click-through rates (CTR) and clicks remain stagnant](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Current content strategy focuses too narrowly on "construction CRM," limiting reach and potential traffic](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)
  - [Publishing delays (35-40 drafts pending) hinder ability to rank for new keywords and gather data](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Team agrees to pivot towards more top-of-funnel content and broader construction-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1000.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Performance Analysis

  - [Impressions steadily increasing, but CTR and clicks remain static](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=172.0)
  - [Overall website CTR: \~2%; blog articles CTR: \~0.4% (last 28 days)](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Ranking well (1st-8th position) for targeted construction CRM keywords](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Best performing article: "Construction Sales Process" (2-3 clicks)](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Weekly impressions hovering around 500, with minimal growth due to slow publishing](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

### Content Strategy Challenges

  - [Narrow focus on "construction CRM" limits keyword opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Risk of keyword cannibalization due to similar topics](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=608.0)
  - [Slow publishing frequency (3-week delay) hinders fresh content ranking](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Founder's detailed review process causes significant publishing delays](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Limited data collection due to delayed publishing affects strategy optimization](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Proposed Strategy Shift

  - [Expand focus beyond "construction CRM" to broader construction-related topics](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
  - [Target higher search volume, top-of-funnel keywords (e.g., construction marketing, sales, finance)](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Increase content production to 15-20 pieces per week (from current 10-12)](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [Implement a tiered review process:](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
    1.  Publish top-of-funnel content quickly
    2.  Maintain rigorous review for bottom-of-funnel articles
    3.  Review high-traffic top-of-funnel content post-publication

### Keyword and Content Ideas

  - [New keyword targets with \~700,000 search volume, including:](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
      - [Construction engineering](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1189.0)
      - [Writing proposals for construction projects](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1192.0)
      - [How to increase sales in construction business](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [Planned topics: SEO for construction firms, construction marketing](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Leverage upcoming customer case study for "increasing sales" content](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sami to collaborate with Prateek on identifying top/middle-of-funnel keywords](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Increase content production to 15-20 pieces weekly](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [Gus to review proposed keywords and content ideas](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1339.0)
  - [Team to send meeting summary to Tom](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Implement new content strategy focusing on broader construction topics](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Monitor performance of new approach and adjust as needed](https://fathom.video/share/S1s9-UPuvVgg84_zZRjHjDmazVMGgQzv?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
